174.reason: [Error: When a single '|' is encountered, it should not be recorded as a valid token "||". The token should be recorded as the actual character "|" or not recorded at all, but the error should still be reported. Here it incorrectly records "||" instead of "|".]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '|' is encountered, it should not be recorded as a valid token "||". The token should be recorded as the actual character "|" or not recorded at all, but the error should still be reported. Here it incorrectly records "||" instead of "|".]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: When a single '|' is encountered, it should not be recorded as "||" token; it should be recorded as an error without creating a token for "||". The code incorrectly creates a token for "||" even when only '|' is present.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly records "||" as token even when input is just "|", which is invalid; should not generate a valid token for erroneous input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly records "||" as token when input is "|", but should not generate a valid token for erroneous single "|" or "&"]

176.reason: [Error: Similarly, when a single '&' is encountered, it should not be recorded as "&&". It incorrectly records "&&" instead of "&".]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Similarly, when a single '&' is encountered, it should not be recorded as "&&". It incorrectly records "&&" instead of "&".]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Similarly, when a single '&' is encountered, it should not be recorded as "&&" token; it should be recorded as an error without creating a token for "&&".
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly records "&&" as token even when input is just "&", which is invalid; should not generate a valid token for erroneous input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: generates "&&" token for single "&", which is wrong; lexical error should not produce a valid token]
